title: Spotting the ancient magic deer
prompt: Wide reverse-POV shot — the camera is positioned looking from the Jeep's roof outward into @magic-forest-sandy. Tall pine trunks frame the shot. In the middle of the composition, between two large pine trunks at mid-distance, the @magic-deer stands stock-still — an ancient stag with oversized branching antlers, faintly glowing soft blue at the antler tips. The deer's head is turned directly toward camera, calm dark eyes meeting the lens. A few floating pollen motes drift in the dappled forest light. The deer is utterly still — only the ears flick once. NO HUMAN CHARACTERS in frame. From off-camera (a faint awed whisper, voice unattributed): "...woah."
